title: Frikamoik
description: Adds Frikamoik to Minecraft Java Edition!
body:
### Frikamoik is an inside joke from my channel and I decided to turn it into a Minecraft mod.

Includes:

4 new food items

2 new advancements

2 new villager trades

3 languages (English, Spanish, Dutch)

You can freely use the Frikamoik/Frikamoik image in your own video's/projects. Just credit me first!
